name: Schultze Special Purpose Acquisition Corp. II
description: Schultze Special Purpose Acquisition Corp. II was a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. Headquartered in Rye Brook, New York, the company was sponsored by Schultze Asset Management. It completed its initial public offering on the NASDAQ exchange to raise capital for potential acquisitions. However, the company ultimately failed to consummate an initial business combination and subsequently redeemed its public shares and liquidated its operations in October 2023.
name_clean: Schultze Special Purpose Acquisition Corp. II
